title: IneligibleCreditSupport
description: Identifies collateral that has been designated as not meeting the eligibility criteria set out in the agreement.

totalIneligibilityDate.description: Specifies the date from which all credit support provided by a party is treated as ineligible under the agreement.

transferIneligibilityDate.description: Specifies the date from which the transfer of credit support by a party is treated as ineligible under the agreement.

specifiedParty.description: Identifies a party designated in the agreement for the purpose of applying particular rights, obligations, or elections.
